Combining the dark, ominous silhouette of the Apache helicopter with a contrasting pink bow, this wall sticker demonstrates Banksy’s ability to defy convention.

This humorous wall sticker is inspired by the work of infamous UK graffiti artist Banksy. It features an old-fashioned TV set being thrown through a broken window. It’s a bold, comedic statement that’s a lot cheaper and less messy than the real thing!
